input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.3.1
            TITLE: any holes in any regulated tubing (other than inspection holes) must be addressed on the ses.

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.3.1: Any holes in any regulated tubing (other than inspection holes) must be addressed on the SES.
F.5.3.1 Any holes in any regulated tubing (other than inspection holes) must be addressed on the SES.

final_answer: Any holes in any regulated tubing (other than inspection holes) must be addressed on the SES.
